biological_replicate: Wild-type yeast was cultured in growth or starvation medium
technical_replicate: All analyses were performed in triplicate with statistical evaluation
experimental_design: the proteins were classified as starvation versus growth specific
factor_value: starvation in potassium acetate and treatment with NAC
number_of_fractions: No mention of fractionation in the text.
number_of_biological_replicates: Since no specific counts are provided, we assume a minimum of 1 biological replicate.
